issues: Network policy in Claude Code remote sandbox blocks DNS resolution for *.trycloudflare.com. Could not reach tunnel to check board, commands, status, or post report.
Static analysis of server.py: syntax OK, all 10 scrapers present (walmart, stocktrack, redflagdeals, flipp, shopify, homedepot, rona, lcbo, saq, bcldb), no broken URLs detected.
overall: unknown — tunnel unreachable from remote execution environment
env_note: Health agent running in Claude Code on the web (cloud sandbox). Anthropic sandbox network policy blocks *.trycloudflare.com DNS and routing. Health checks require an execution environment on the same network as the tunnel (e.g. local Claude Code CLI on the user's machine, or a server on the same LAN). Recommend running the health agent via local Claude Code CLI instead.
